title: Portfolio Dashboard
description: A full-stack project management dashboard built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Supports multi-user authentication and real-time notifications.

title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A modern e-commerce web application featuring product listings, cart management, payment integration, and an admin panel.

title: Task Manager CLI
description: A command-line task management tool built with Go, allowing users to track todos, set priorities, and export reports.

title: Weather App
description: A responsive weather forecast app consuming a public weather API, with location search and 7-day forecast display.
